gates.name: Incoming & ESD
gates.pass: Serial matches RMA; no leak, crack, or loose HV
gates.fail_action: Hold + NCR; photo evidence; notify customer
gates.plain_why: Catches transport damage and wrong-part returns before any electrical work.

gates.name: HV isolation (IR)
gates.tools: IR tester 500 V DC, HV PPE
gates.fail_action: STOP — no energize; dry-out or module isolation hunt
gates.plain_why: Proves the pack won't shock a technician or short to chassis.

gates.name: Cell / module balance
gates.fail_action: Identify weak module; balance test charge; log spread %
gates.plain_why: Imbalanced cells stress the pack and cause early failure or range loss.

gates.name: BMS diagnostics
gates.pass: No active safety DTCs; heartbeat OK
gates.fail_action: Trace comm layer before swapping board; check firmware profile
gates.plain_why: Many 'dead battery' reports are connector or config — not cells.

gates.name: Thermal system
gates.tools: Pressure gauge, leak spray, pump command
gates.fail_action: Repair leak path; verify cold-plate contact after module work
gates.plain_why: Thermal faults become fires or capacity loss in the field.

gates.name: Repair execution
gates.pass: Repair per approved work instruction; torque logged
gates.fail_action: Stop line if WI deviation; QE sign-off for escape
gates.plain_why: Repeat faults often trace to skipped steps — not mystery defects.

gates.name: Post-repair functional
gates.pass: Profiles within spec; contactors sequence OK
gates.plain_why: Proves the fix works under load — not only on paper.

gates.name: Final release
gates.tools: Label printer, SPC chart, inspection log
gates.pass: Pack V in control; docs complete; FTTR marked Yes
gates.fail_action: Hold shipment; open 8D if repeat pattern
gates.plain_why: Last line of defence before the pack returns to a bus or ESS site.
